title: A golf scoring card and systems and methods for using the same
abstract: A method for improving the experience of a participant of a sporting contest includes the steps of; offering to the participant a side bet in which there is a chance for the participant to receive a prize if the participant achieves or betters a target score In the sporting contest (Irrespective of the final Outcome- of the sporting contest), receiving acceptance of the offer by the participant who pays a wager for the side bet, assigning the participant a prize and a target score that needs to be achieved or bettered for the participant to be awarded the prize, and awarding the prize to the participant if the personal score Is equal to or better than the target score.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for improving the e perience of a participant of a sporting contest, the method comprising the steps of: (a) offering to the participant a side hot i which there is a chance for the participant to receive a prise if the participant achieves or bettors a target score in the sporting contest, irrespective of the final outcome of the sporting contest; (b) receiving an acceptance of the offer by the participant paying a wager for the side bet; (c) assigning the participant a first prize and a target score that: needs to he achieved or bettered for the participant to be awarded the prize; (d) the participant engaging in the sporting contest and so recording a personal score, and ( ) awarding the first prize to the participant if the personal score is equal to or better than the targ t score. 2. The method of claim 1 wherein the participant is also provided a chance to be awarded a second prtm, irrespective of whether the participant achieved or bettered the target score to obtain the first prize, 3. A sticker, ticket or score card for use in the method of claim 1 and which is provided on a surface thereof with; (i) reveaiable indicia that indicates the prize; (Â¾) revealabie indicia that indicates the target score, which if achieved 

 or bettered, entitles the player to redeem the sticker, ticket or seem card for the prize, 4. The sticker, ticket or score card of claim 3 which has a face value which represents the wager to be paid If the participant were to accept the offer of the side bet, 5. The sticker, ticket or score card of claim S which is further provided on a tia thereof with a visible first unique identifier, 6. The sticker, ticket or score card of claim 3 comprising a score card issued by an organiser of the sporting contest and which Is provided o a surface thereof with content specific to a venue at which the score card is to be used.

The wagering system of claim 13 wherein the wagering system is operated to generate the one or more first prizes- and target scores such that an expected prize payout is less than a monetary amount of the wager or wagers paid. I S. The wagering system of oiairn 13 which Is farther operated to print or cause to be printed, one or more of the sticker, ticket or score card of any one of claims 3 to i 1. 16. The wagering system of claim 13 further comprising an Information terminal and a remote printing device located a a venue i which the sporting contest take place and communicating with the computer processor via the communication means, and wherein the remote printing device generates a sticker, ticket or score card on demand by the participant who has paid the wager for the side bet and who has issued or causes a omm nd to fee Issued to the information terminal and wherein the so generated sticker, ticket or score card Is provided on a surface thereof with: (!) indicia that indicates the prize; (ft) indicia that indicates tlie target score, which if achieved or bettered, entitles the player to redeem the sticker, ticket or score card for the prize, 17, The wagering system of claim 16 wherein the data storage ' means maintains a record of the one or more of the sticker, ticket or score card printed or caused to e printed, and wherein the wagering system further comprise authentication moans for authenticating a sticker, ticket or score card when the participant seeks to redeem the sticker, ticket or score card for the p m. 18. The wagering system of claim 17 wherein the authentication means is operated by nter ng a! leas! one u ique identifier of the sticker, ticket qr score card into the information terminal which then communicates electronically with the authentication means to obtain verification that the sticker, ticket or score card is authentic and unredeemed, and to confirm the prize and the target score that Is recorded In the data storage means of the wagering system and thai Is associated with the at least one unique Identifier. 19. The wagering system of claim 15 which Is configured to communicate with an Information terminal located at a venue In which the sporting contest takes place, and wherein at least one unique identifier of the sticker, ticket or score card is entered into the information terminal along with information to identify and record the participant for whom the sticker, ticket or score card was printed. 20. The wagering system of claim 19 which is further configured to receive from the information terminal information comprising the at least one unique identifier to confirm that It has been provided to the participant, the participant's identification Information, and the venue at which the information terminal Is located. 21. The wagering system of claim 19 wherein t e information terminal includes a scanner of barcode or other machine readable information which serves as the at least one unique identifier, the scanner communicating with the computer processor via the communication means during a purchase and/or a redemption of the sticker, ticket or score card b the participant. 

 22, A wagering s stem comprising a computer processor, data input means to the computer processor, data output means from the computer processor, data storage moans, and communic ton means which communicates with a mobile communications device of a participant of a sporting contest, wherein the wagering system Is configured to: (a) receive an Input from the mobile communications device that indicates that the participant Is to wager a side bet that the participant will achieve or better s target score in the sporting contest for the participant to be awarded a prize; (b) provide to the participant through the mobile communications device a virtual stinker, ticket or score card In which the participant is Informed of the prize and the target score that needs to be achieved or bette e by the participant in the sporting contest; (c) receive from an authorised ihivd party the results of the sporting contest, including a personal score of the participant; (d) award the prize to the participant if the personal score !s equal to or better than the target score, 23, The wagering system of claim 13 or claim 22 wherein the wagering system Is operated to generate a prize and a target score based cn historical records of redemptions for a particular sporting contest and/or for a particular venue for the sporting contest and/or for a particular participant 24, The wagering system of claim 13 or claim .22 wherein the wagering system is operated to receive from the participant, via the communications means, an indication that the participant wishes to be provided a chance to be awarded a second prize, irrespective of whether the participant achieved or bettered the target score to obtain the first prize.
